stemHtml: What kind of activity is a part of a Meteorological Watch Office`s (MWO) responsibilities?

options.a: Analysing information received on pre-eruptive volcanic activity to identify any potential impact on forecasting.
options.b: Keeping a continuous watch over the meteorological conditions within the areas adjacent to its own area of responsibility.
options.c: Providing briefings, consultation and flight documentation to flight crew members and/or other flight operations personnel.
options.d: Preparing and disseminating SIGMETs and other information relating to a specific Flight Information Region(FIR).
